name: QA 1451
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1451

pmdumptext -i botches scaling ...



valgrind variant, see qa/1450 for the non-valgrind variant



Marko's bug https://github.com/performancecopilot/pcp/issues/406 from

Dec 2017!
